provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Seeds Certification Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: seeds in respect of which a certificate has been issued under section 9
seeds in respect of which a certificate has been issued under section 8

all matter other than seeds of the kind of which the parcel purports to consist, and includes—
( a ) any seeds of the kind of which the parcel purports to consist which are sprouted, shrivelled, cracked, insect damaged, diseased or otherwise injured
any person appointed as an inspector under section 3
weeds declared to be noxious weeds under the Noxious Weeds Act (Cap. 35:04)
any person appointed as a seed-tester under section 5
